title: viola × fryeri
intro: Viola × fryeri, also known as the hybrid viola, is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola riviniana, resulting in a unique and adaptable plant species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola × fryeri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Viola × fryeri include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations and respiratory infections.
